feedback.text: When consumers buy a computer the user can install whatever they want as they are the admin/root user. A phone is a small computer so I would also expect to have rights to do what I want with a phone just like a computer. That means freedom to choose what apps I install whether from the manufacturer, third party via Internet, or of my own making. This non sense of manufacturers determine and dictate my access level for a device I own is not consumer friendly. I expect government to protect the people from greed or corporations who seek profit at consumer expense.
